columns.biomass_volume: adu.sum(0.0673 * (for_sp.dens * (meas1 + meas2 + meas3 + meas4 + meas5 + meas6 + meas7 + meas8 + meas9 + meas10)^2 * hgt_perp)^0.976 if cond = 1) / (20^2 * pi() / 10000) / 1000
columns.bio_idx_deadWood: ((adu.sum(0.0673 * (for_dw.dens * (meas1 + meas2 + meas3 + meas4 + meas5 + meas6 + meas7 + meas8 + meas9 + meas10)^2 * hgt_perp)^0.976 if cond = 2) + adu.sum(pi() / 3 * ((meas_b / 2)^2 + ((meas_e / 2)^2 + meas_b / 2 + meas_e / 2) * lght * for_dw.dens) if cond = 3)) / adu.sum(0.0673 * (for_sp.dens * (meas1 + meas2 + meas3 + meas4 + meas5 + meas6 + meas7 + meas8 + meas9 + meas10)^2 * hgt_perp)^0.976 if cond = 1)) * 10
columns.bio_idx_diametric_distribution: adu.gini(meas1 + meas2 + meas3 + meas4 + meas5 + meas6 + meas7 + meas8 + meas9 + meas10) * 10
columns.soil_structure_idx: (thk1*float(not1) + thk2*float(not2) + thk3*float(not3) + thk4*float(not4) + thk5*float(not5)) / (thk1 + thk2 + thk3 + thk4 + thk5) * 2
columns.soil_eros_water_infiltration: 600 * 300 / ( (epoch(interval(beer1)) + epoch(interval(beer2)) + epoch(interval(beer3)) + epoch(interval(beer4)) + epoch(interval(beer5)) + epoch(interval(beer6)) + epoch(interval(beer7)) + epoch(interval(beer8)) + epoch(interval(beer9)) + epoch(interval(beer10)) ) / 10 * pi() * 9^2) if beer1 != '' else 0
columns.soil_surface_fauna_diversity: list_unique(list_concat(list(nullif(barba_001.concat_ws('-', barbA_tax1, barbA_tax2, barbA_tax3), '')), list(nullif(barbb_001.concat_ws('-', barbB_tax1, barbB_tax2, barbB_tax3), '')), list(nullif(barbc_001.concat_ws('-', barbC_tax1, barbC_tax2, barbC_tax3), '')), list(nullif(barbd_001.concat_ws('-', barbD_tax1, barbD_tax2, barbD_tax3), ''))))
columns.soil_surface_fauna_abundance: list_aggregate(list_concat(list(barba_001.concat_ws('-', barbA_tax1, barbA_tax2, barbA_tax3)), list(barbb_001.concat_ws('-', barbB_tax1, barbB_tax2, barbB_tax3)), list(barbc_001.concat_ws('-', barbC_tax1, barbC_tax2, barbC_tax3)), list(barbd_001.concat_ws('-', barbD_tax1, barbD_tax2, barbD_tax3))), 'histogram')

columns.wood_fuel_cons: sum( 12 * ( ifnull(fw_qty * enq_fw.fw_vol * fw_freq, 0) + ifnull(coal_qty * enq_coal.coal_kg * coal_freq * enq_coal.coal_fw, 0) / enq_coal.coal_dens )) / sum(res)
columns.firewood_satis1: count(1 if wf_satis = '1') / count(1 if int(wf_satis) > 0) * 100
columns.firewood_satis2: count(1 if wf_satis = '2') / count(1 if int(wf_satis) > 0) * 100
columns.firewood_satis3: count(1 if wf_satis = '3') / count(1 if int(wf_satis) > 0) * 100
columns.firewood_satis98: count(1 if wf_satis = '98') / count(1 if int(wf_satis) > 0) * 100
columns.firewood_satis99: count(1 if wf_satis = '99') / count(1 if int(wf_satis) > 0) * 100
columns.timber_satis1: count(1 if timb_satis = '1' and timb_yn = '1') / count(1 if timb_yn = '1') * 100
columns.timber_satis2: count(1 if timb_satis = '2' and timb_yn = '1') / count(1 if timb_yn = '1') * 100
columns.timber_satis3: count(1 if timb_satis = '3' and timb_yn = '1') / count(1 if timb_yn = '1') * 100
columns.timber_satis98: count(1 if timb_satis = '98' and timb_yn = '1') / count(1 if timb_yn = '1') * 100
columns.timber_satis99: count(1 if timb_satis = '99' and timb_yn = '1') / count(1 if timb_yn = '1') * 100
columns.revenue_change: avg(0 - inc_dif if inc_evol = '2' else ifnull(inc_dif, 0))
columns.assets_idx: 10 / int(ass_tot_max) * avg( ( ( int(hous_typ) + int(hous_size)) * int(hous_own) + list_unique(ass) + int(lvst_yn) * ( int(lvst_s) + int(lvst_l) ) + int( land_own ) + int( land_titl ) + int( land_size ) ) if ( ( int(hous_typ) + int(hous_size)) * int(hous_own) + list_unique(ass) + int(lvst_yn) * ( int(lvst_s) + int(lvst_l) ) + int( land_own ) + int( land_titl ) + int( land_size ) ) <= int(ass_tot_max) )
